summary: Good‑quality recording captures an electrifying Wharf Rat jam (dubbed “Franklin’s fire”) as the Dead stay on fire despite rain.
review: The three reviewers rave about the show’s energy, especially the extended jam into Wharf Rat that one fan calls the highest point of the band’s onstage creativity. Even a rainstorm didn’t dampen the vibe—keyboardist kept things moving and a nod from Jerry added to the excitement. No concrete complaints about the audio are made; listeners simply wish for lossless files, suggesting the existing source is decent but not described in detail.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about performance (70% weight) and no clear recording issues (30% weight) lead to a high overall rating, though limited technical detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not mention specific sound problems; one notes desire for lossless formats but no complaints about clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rain fell during the set, yet the band kept momentum—keyboardist played through it and audience stayed engaged, highlighted by a nod exchange with Jerry.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer exchanged a nod with him, indicating strong stage presence.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keyboardist (referred to as “keyboardest”) kept the vibe alive despite the rain.
